prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation using historical daily log returns of BKNG over the past 5 years. A Geometric Brownian Motion model was applied, where daily price changes are assumed to follow a log-normal distribution. The mean daily log return and standard deviation of daily log returns were calculated from historical data. 10,000 simulations were run for a 1-day forecast. The point estimate is the median of the simulated prices, and confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated price distribution. Factors not captured by this model include unexpected news, market sentiment shifts, macroeconomic events, and company-specific announcements.
